chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.447 of 2024 Abdul Sattar Jatoi Versus Dawn Media Group & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 2717/24 2. For orders on CMA 2718/24 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 2719/24 Dated: 21.10.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant has impugned two orders before us, the first order of which was passed on 14.03.2024 in terms whereof learned counsel was confronted with a question as to how the suit could be entertained in pursuance of Section 42 of Specific Relief Act read with Article 19 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. It appears that the case was adjourned on that day without a date and subsequently when urgency was filed to assist the Court on the question posed to the plaintiff/appellant, it (the urgency) was dismissed via second impugned order of 17.10.2024. We have heard the learned counsel and are of the view that in all fairness learned counsel ought to have been given an indulgence, at least to the extent that he may assist the Court in response to the question raised by the Court itself. We, therefore, deem it appropriate to dispose of this High Court Appeal with directions that the subject suit, which has been registered and assigned a number, be fixed in this week before learned Single Judge. Since no notice was issued to the defendants in the suit, therefore, we are disposing of this appeal with the above understanding without issuing any notice. Appeal stands disposed of along with listed applications in the above terms.

Since no notice was issued to the defendants in the suit, therefore, we are disposing of this appeal with the above understanding without issuing any notice. Appeal stands disposed of along with listed applications in the above terms. Chief Justice Judge
